purpose: Check the layout impact of tightening Figure 3's provenance caption after the user-reported red-material concern.

page_review.visible_evidence: Figure 3 remains readable, the caption stays attached, and the material-effect panels show no visible red-material fallback.
page_review.main_risk: The caption must stay compact; a longer provenance sentence was tested and rejected because it pushed Figure 4 to the next page.

page_review.visible_evidence: Figure 4 remains at the top of page 9 with attached caption, followed by Limitations and Ethical Considerations without overlap.
page_review.main_risk: The page is dense, but it no longer contains the large blank-column layout produced by the rejected long caption draft.

accepted_caption_change: Figure 3 now says the original-MDL cells passed a log-checked clean rerender/provenance gate.
rejected_iteration: A longer sentence saying every original cell had a checked render log with no MDL-resolution error signal was rejected after visual review because it moved Figure 4 to page 10 and left page 9 with a large blank column.
claim_boundary: Figure 3 remains selected qualitative material-effect evidence only.
The provenance wording supports clean original-MDL render inclusion; it does not expand NVIDIA, material-fidelity, or population-level claims.
No new image generation was performed for this targeted text/layout hardening.
